zh.lifeSummary: 當Balso de Bayeux於0930年出生在法國諾門迪貝也時，他的父親Count Raoul Ralph De Bayeux55歲，母親Ernburge de Caux30歲。他於0954年與Judith de Boulogne在法國巴-諾門迪卡爾瓦多斯貝也結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於大約1010年在法國巴-諾門迪卡爾瓦多斯貝也享年81歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Balso de Bayeux于0930年出生在法国諾門迪貝也时，他的父亲Count Raoul Ralph De Bayeux55岁，母亲Ernburge de Caux30岁。他于0954年与Judith de Boulogne在法国巴-諾門迪卡爾瓦多斯貝也结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于大约1010年在法国巴-諾門迪卡爾瓦多斯貝也享年81岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Bayeux
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Landry, Alphonse, Andre, Armand, Colette, Monique, Theophile.
French (northern): from an old form of   Mayeur  . Compare   Mayeaux  .

variants.name: Mayeaux
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Clemile, Ferrel.

nameMeanings.name: Balso
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Dorset): possibly a variant of the habitational name Balsdon, which is most probably from Great Boulsdon in Newent (Gloucestershire), Balstone in Buckland Monachorum, or Bulstone in Branscombe (both Devon). Alternatively, it may be derived from a Middle English personal name derived from an unattested Old English personal name formed with beald ‘bold’ + stān ‘stone’). Compare Bolson and Balsam .

variants.name: Bulson
meanings: English: most probably a patronymic from anunidentified medieval personal name, but compare   Balson   and   Bolson  .

variants.name: Bolson
meanings: English: possibly a variant of   Balson   or   Bulson  .

en.lifeSummary: When Balso de Bayeux was born in 0930, in Bayeux, Normandy, France, his father, Count Raoul Ralph De Bayeux, was 55 and his mother, Ernburge de Caux, was 30. He married Judith de Boulogne in 0954, in Bayeux, Calvados, Lower Normandy, France. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. He died about 1010, in Bayeux, Calvados, Lower Normandy, France, at the age of 81.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Balso de Bayeux est né en 0930, à Bayeux, Normandie, France, son père, Count Raoul Ralph De Bayeux, avait 55 ans et sa mère, Ernburge de Caux, avait 30 ans. Il a épousé Judith de Boulogne en 0954, à Bayeux, Calvados, Basse-Normandie, France. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé environ 1010, à Bayeux, Calvados, Basse-Normandie, France, à l’âge de 81 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Balso de Bayeux 0930 in Bayeux, Normandie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Count Raoul Ralph De Bayeux 55 und seine Mutter Ernburge de Caux 30. Er hat 0954 in Bayeux, Calvados, Basse-Normandie, Frankreich Judith de Boulogne geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Er starb um 1010 im Alter von 81 Jahren in Bayeux, Calvados, Basse-Normandie, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Balso de Bayeux è nato il nel 0930 nel Bayeux, Normandie, Francia, il suo padre, Count Raoul Ralph De Bayeux, aveva 55 anni e il suo madre, Ernburge de Caux, aveva 30 anni. Lui sposato Judith de Boulogne nel 0954, nel Bayeux, Calvados, Basse-Normandie, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì circa 1010, nel Bayeux, Calvados, Basse-Normandie, Francia, all'età di 81 anni.

ja.Bayeux, Bayeux, Calvados, Basse-Normandi: フランスバセ-ノーマンディカルヴァドスバイエウックス
ja.lifeSummary: Balso de Bayeuxが0930年にフランスノーマンディバイエウックスで生まれた時，父Count Raoul Ralph De Bayeuxは55歳，母Ernburge de Cauxは30歳であった。0954年にフランスバセ-ノーマンディカルヴァドスバイエウックスでJudith de Boulogneと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は約1010年にフランスバセ-ノーマンディカルヴァドスバイエウックスで81歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Balso de Bayeux(이)가 0930년 프랑스 노먼디 베이우스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Count Raoul Ralph De Bayeux(은)는 55세였고, 그의 어머니 Ernburge de Caux(은)는 30세였다. 그는 0954년 프랑스 배세-노먼디 캘바도스 베이우스에서 Judith de Boulogne(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1010년 프랑스 배세-노먼디 캘바도스 베이우스에서 81세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Balso de Bayeux nasceu em 0930, em Bayeux, Normandie, França, seu pai, Count Raoul Ralph De Bayeux, tinha 55 anos e sua mãe, Ernburge de Caux, tinha 30 anos. Ele casou-se com Judith de Boulogne em 0954, em Bayeux, Calvados, Basse-Normandie, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1010, em Bayeux, Calvados, Basse-Normandie, França, com 81 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Balso de Bayeux родился в 0930 г. в местности беиеукс, норманди, Франция, его отцу по имени Count Raoul Ralph De Bayeux было 55 лет, а матери, которую звали Ernburge de Caux, 30. Он женился на женщине по имени Judith de Boulogne в 0954 г. в местности беиеукс, калвадос, бассе-норманди, Франция. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Он умер около 1010 г. в местности беиеукс, калвадос, бассе-норманди, Франция в возрасте 81 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Balso de Bayeux nació en 0930, en Bayeux, Normandie, Francia, su papá, Count Raoul Ralph De Bayeux, tenía 55 años y su mamá, Ernburge de Caux, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Judith de Boulogne en 0954, en Bayeux, Calvados, Basse-Normandie, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió aproximadamente 1010, en Bayeux, Calvados, Basse-Normandie, Francia, a la edad de 81 años.
